title: AE2 Molecular Assembler Plus
description: QoL addon for Applied Energistics 2 that adds advanced Molecular Assemblers, pattern terminals, and expanded auto-crafting support for large and modded recipes
body:
AE2 Molecular Assembler Plus is a Quality-of-Life addon for Applied Energistics 2, focused on improving late-game automation and making complex modded crafting workflows easier to use.

The mod adds universal pattern tools and dedicated molecular assemblers for supported crafting systems. It is not limited to 9x9 recipes: integrations can support large crafting grids, custom layouts, recipe tiers, catalysts, energy costs, and specialized crafting stations.

  • an Extreme Pattern Encoding Terminal with a 9x9 crafting grid
  • a Draconic Pattern Encoding Terminal for fusion crafting recipes
  • dedicated blank and encoded patterns for supported recipe types
  • Extreme and tiered Draconic Molecular Assemblers for AE2 auto-crafting
  • JEI + recipe transfer support for supported recipe categories

Supported Integrations

Applied Energistics 2 is the base mod. Other integrations are optional and load only when the matching mod is installed.

  • Extended Crafting
  • Extended Crafting: Expanded
  • Re:Avaritia
  • AvaritiaNeo
  • Draconic Evolution

The mod can also be installed without optional integrations. In that case, only the base AE2 recipes and available AE2 automation features are loaded.

Current Focus

  • Better automation comfort for complex recipes
  • Cleaner AE2-based crafting workflows
  • Optional compatibility with popular crafting and automation mods
  • Practical QoL tools instead of unnecessary feature bloat

Roadmap

Future updates are planned to expand support toward more modded crafting stations, including Botania, Blood Magic, and other automation-heavy crafting systems.

Developer Note

I am a small / beginner mod developer, and this project is still growing. If you find bugs, balancing issues, or have ideas for improvements, feedback is very welcome. Constructive criticism helps improve both this mod and my development skills.
